code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Groupware_KanbanBoard] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Groupware_ChatRoom) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Groupware_IssueTracker) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Groupware_ChatRoom) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Groupware_ChatRoom) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Groupware_KanbanBoard) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Groupware_KanbanBoard) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Groupware_IssueTracker) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Groupware_ChatRoom) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器模式的时序图，用来描述我们的Webhook投递和外部服务调用的容错机制。核心有三个状态：Closed、Open和HalfOpen。
明白，这是典型的熔断器状态机。我先用Groupware_KanbanBoard作为起点指向Closed状态。另外我想确认一下，Closed到Open的触发条件是什么？是失败次数超过阈值吗？
对，当Failure Threshold Exceeded时从Closed转到Open，这个事件我们关联到Groupware_ChatRoom。另外Closed状态内部有两个自环：Successful Request走Groupware_IssueTracker，Failed Request走Groupware_ChatRoom。
好的，我已经画好了Closed状态的所有转换。现在处理Open状态：当Timeout Elapsed时应该转到HalfOpen，这个事件也走Groupware_ChatRoom。另外Open状态本身有个自环，当Request Attempted时保持在Open，走Groupware_KanbanBoard。
HalfOpen状态比较复杂：Test Request Successful时回到Closed，走Groupware_KanbanBoard；Test Request Failed时回到Open，走Groupware_IssueTracker；还有一个Waiting for Test的自环，走Groupware_ChatRoom。
状态转换都画好了。我现在给每个状态添加右侧注释：Closed状态说明所有请求通过、监控失败率、跟踪响应时间、递增错误计数器；Open状态说明阻塞所有请求、返回缓存或错误、等待超时、记录阻塞尝试；HalfOpen状态说明允许测试请求、限制吞吐量、监控成功率、快速决策转换。
等等，HalfOpen到Open的Test Request Failed路径，我刚才说错了，应该是走Groupware_IssueTracker，但你可能记成Groupware_ChatRoom了？让我再确认一下——不对，我刚才说的就是Groupware_IssueTracker，你画对了吗？
确认无误，HalfOpen到Open的Test Request Failed确实是走Groupware_IssueTracker。所有状态和转换都已完成，三个状态的详细注释也都加上了。图已经符合我们Webhook投递的熔断器设计了。
